_note: LEGACY/REFUTED DEATH-WRITE PROBE - HP=0 + KO FLAG (docs/modding/07 Tests 2b/2c). Live evidence proved setting +0x61|=0x20 after forcing HP=0 still creates a zombie/partial state, not real KO; the KO bit is an effect of engine death, not a trigger. Keep this only for reproducing or auditing the historical result. Current custom-formula profiles use MinHpFloor=1 and let the engine own death.

DeathStateWrites.Name: KO-0x61-bit0x20
DeathStateWrites._mask_hex: 0x20 = 32 dec (set on every death in Test 2a)
